节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides APIs for managing USB-to-virtual serial ports and implementing USB-to-virtual serial port communication.
Obtains the serial port device list.
注释信息: @returns { Readonly<SerialPort>[]} Returns the list of serial port devices obtained.
节点.return_description: Returns the list of serial port devices obtained.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether a serial port device has the access right. The system applications have the access right by default. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number} portId ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
@returns {boolean} Returns true if the device has the right; returns false otherwise.

parameters.说明: ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.

节点.return_description: Returns true if the device has the right; returns false otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Requests the right for accessing a serial port device from the user. The system applications do not need to call this API. The value true means the user allows the access; the value false means the opposite. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number} portId ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
@returns { Promise<boolean>} Promise used to return the result.

parameters.说明: ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.

节点.return_description: Promise used to return the result.

节点.功能描述: Cancels the access right for a serial port device. This API will not cancel the default access right of system applications. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number} portId ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
@throws { BusinessError } 31400002 Access denied. Call requestSerialRight to request user authorization first.

parameters.说明: ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.

节点.功能描述: Opens a serial port device. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number} portId ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
@throws { BusinessError } 31400002 Access denied. Call requestSerialRight to request user authorization first.
@throws { BusinessError } 31400004 The serial port device is occupied.

parameters.说明: ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.

节点.功能描述: Closes a serial port device. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number} portId ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
@throws { BusinessError } 31400005 The serial port device is not opened. Call the open API first.

parameters.说明: ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the communication parameters of a serial port device. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number} portId ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
@returns { Readonly<SerialAttribute>} Communication parameters obtained, which are read-only.
@throws { BusinessError } 31400005 The serial port device is not opened. Call the open API first.

parameters.说明: ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.

节点.return_description: Communication parameters obtained, which are read-only.

节点.功能描述: Sets the communication parameters for a serial port device. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number} portId ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
@param { SerialAttribute} attribute Communication parameters to set.
@throws { BusinessError } 31400005 The serial port device is not opened. Call the open API first.

parameters.说明: ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
Communication parameters to set.

节点.功能描述:
Reads data from a serial port device. This API uses a promise to return the result. The default value 0 indicates that there is no time limit for data reading. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
1. The transfer was canceled.
2. The device offered more data than allowed.
注释信息: @param { number} portId ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
@param { Uint8Array } buffer Buffer for storing the data read, with a maximum length of 8192 bytes.
@param { number } timeout Timeout duration for reading data. The value is a non-negative number.
@returns { Promise<number> } Promise used to return the length of the data read.
@throws { BusinessError } 31400005 The serial port device is not opened. Call the open API first.

parameters.说明: ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
Buffer for storing the data read, with a maximum length of 8192 bytes.
Timeout duration for reading data. The value is a non-negative number.

节点.return_description: Promise used to return the length of the data read.

节点.功能描述:
Reads data from a serial port device. This API returns the result synchronously. The default value 0 indicates that there is no time limit for data reading. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
1. The transfer was canceled.
2. The device offered more data than allowed.
注释信息: @param { number} portId ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
@param { Uint8Array } buffer Buffer for storing the data read, with a maximum length of 8192 bytes.
@param { number } timeout Timeout duration for reading data. The value is a non-negative number.
@throws { BusinessError } 31400005 The serial port device is not opened. Call the open API first.

parameters.说明: ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
Buffer for storing the data read, with a maximum length of 8192 bytes.
Timeout duration for reading data. The value is a non-negative number.

节点.功能描述:
Writes data to a serial port device. This API uses a promise to return the result. The default value 0 indicates that there is no time limit for data writing. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
1. The transfer was canceled.
2. The device offered more data than allowed.
注释信息: @param { number} portId ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
@param { Uint8Array } buffer Buffer for storing the data written, with a maximum length of 128 KB.
@param { number } timeout Timeout duration for writing data. The value is a non-negative number.
@returns { Promise<number> } Promise used to return the length of the data written.
@throws { BusinessError } 31400005 The serial port device is not opened. Call the open API first.

parameters.说明: ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
Buffer for storing the data written, with a maximum length of 128 KB.
Timeout duration for writing data. The value is a non-negative number.

节点.return_description: Promise used to return the length of the data written.

节点.功能描述:
Writes data to a serial port device. This API returns the result synchronously. The default value 0 indicates that there is no time limit for data writing. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
1. The transfer was canceled.
2. The device offered more data than allowed.
注释信息: @param { number} portId ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
@param { Uint8Array } buffer Buffer for storing the data written, with a maximum length of 128 KB.
@param { number } timeout Timeout duration for writing data. The value is a non-negative number.
@returns { number } Length of the data written.
@throws { BusinessError } 31400005 The serial port device is not opened. Call the open API first.

parameters.说明: ID of the target device. For details, see SerialPort.portId.
Buffer for storing the data written, with a maximum length of 128 KB.
Timeout duration for writing data. The value is a non-negative number.

节点.功能描述: Represents the communication parameters of a serial port device.
Enumerates the baud rates of a serial port device, in bit/s.
Enumerates the data bits of a serial port device.
The number of data bits is 8.
The number of data bits is 7.
The number of data bits is 6.
The number of data bits is 5.
Enumerates the parity bits of a serial port device.
Mark parity, whose parity bit is always 1.
Space parity, whose parity bit is always 0.
Enumerates the stop bits for serial port communication.
The number of stop bits is 1.
The number of stop bits is 2.
